chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1183 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case. 25-09-2025 M/s Ashok Kumar K. Jamba and Asadullah Soomro, Advocates for the Petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional Advocate General Sindh >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press the present Constitutional Petition and submits that the Petitioner intends to file a fresh petition after obtaining a new disability certificate from the Committee constituted in 2019 under the Sindh Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2018, which is not opposed by other side. Order accordingly. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
